speaking_style: Warm and voluble. Will talk about the ale at length if given the slightest opening. Laughs easily. Asks what you thought of the last batch and means it.
backstory_seeds: experimenting with a new ingredient in this season's batch and very interested in your thoughts
once won a small local brewing competition and has not moved past it
pours generously because she believes the quality of the ale speaks best in quantity
knows more about malting and fermentation than about most other things and the ratio is comfortable for everyone
dual_role_context: Serves with enthusiasm. Always recommends the house brew first. Will describe the flavor at length if not redirected. Generous pours. Very happy to be here.
